structure_flags.label: Bibliography
structure_flags.one_line: Verified metadata disagree with the bibliography: Imai-Jiang-Malani is JASA 116(534):632-644, and Vazquez-Bare's JASA IV article is 'Causal Spillover Effects Using Instrumental Variables', 118(543):1911-1922.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Flagship comparator chain cites Hoshino-Yanagi and Schroder et al. without section/page/equation anchors tying the exact finite sharp-bound/nonrepresentability gap to their papers.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the proposal names a constructive stitched-vs-shared gap but Exhibit 9.1 does not compute a primitive observed law, joint LP endpoint, stitched endpoint, or numeric strict gap with an internal feasibility check.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The target uses q_{i,s,t,rZ,rD}(G) and N_C, but q is not a decision variable or derived from the matching equations, and N_C can be zero unless positive complier mass is assumed.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1 / Exhibit 9.1
soundness_flags.one_line: The witness route fails as written: with uniform exactly-one encouragement and K_3=1, no isolated feasible completion gives Q_i^Z(1|0,t)=1 for all three units; the advertised stitched point is outside Definition 1's own support envelope.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace Exhibit 9.1 with a fully specified observed law, e.g. adjust the assignment support if needed, then compute both LP endpoints and verify every Q, lambda, and outcome moment from Section 6 primitives.
Add location-level anchors for Hoshino-Yanagi and Schroder et al. identifying exactly which theorem, section, or equation lacks the shared-completion dual-map complier sharpness result.
Repair Theorem 1 by adding latent response-type variables or explicit formulas deriving q and N_C from the finite primitive distribution, including a positive-complier denominator condition.

recommended_next_step: Revise the LP primitive definitions and replace the nonsharpness witness with a computed feasible instance before resubmitting for flagship-tier review.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal does strictly widen the parent by adding monotone IV take-up, latent compliance, and a second hidden exposure channel, with a stated parent-corner reduction.
